subject: Charmeleon, the flame lizard Pokemon — mid-stage fire-type creature rearing back with claws raised and tail flame blazing
description: Charmeleon stands in a dynamic posture against a dark fiery background, forelimbs raised and claws extended in an aggressive stance. The creature's orange-red body is clearly lit by the glow of fire, with the characteristic flaming tail burning brightly behind it. Flames and embers surround the figure, reinforcing its fire-type identity. The composition is a close mid-shot centering the creature's upper body and face, which shows an open-jawed, fierce expression.
foreground: Charmeleon rearing with claws raised, surrounded by fire and embers
background: dark fiery environment with flame and smoke
